cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently cite competitive salaries and robust benefit packages, including wellness subsidies, as primary positive aspects of their employment.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: The firm is recognized for offering flexible hybrid work schedules and generous time-off policies, which contribute to a positive work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff value the professional development opportunities and the chance to work on diverse client projects, viewing the firm as a strong resume builder.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of excessive workloads, chaotic team environments, and a lack of support from management highlight significant stress factors for some employees.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some reviews indicate concerns regarding toxic team dynamics, excessive pressure to meet utilization goals, and a lack of transparency in organizational changes.
